name: california-mariposa
description: Mariposa County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: Mariposa County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past Mariposa County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('Mariposa County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: Mariposa County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract Mariposa County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-mariposa-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-mariposa-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The page uses a CivicPlus template structure with content wrapped in 'cpGrid' and 'pageContent' containers.
Representative data is likely located within the main content area under 'bodyContainerTS' or within a specific widget section not fully rendered in the snippet.
Image URLs are relative paths starting with '/ImageRepository/Document?documentID=' requiring absolutization.
The HTML snippet provided is truncated (indicated by '<!-- [truncated] -->'), meaning the actual list of representatives is likely missing from the provided text.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for Mariposa County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: Mariposa County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for Mariposa County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: Mariposa County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
NOTE: UNCERTAIN — No NetFile portal found for Mariposa; small county.
